case_title: CHARLES MICHAEL OLLIE VS. JAIME HUMBERTO RODRIGUEZ et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED NOV-15-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-23-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-23-2023 BY JUDGE PANG LY. PLAINTIFF CHARLES MICHAEL OLLIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT JAIME HUMBERTO RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT WITH WITNESSES: CESAR RODRIGUEZ AND PEDRO RODRIGUEZ. DEFENDANT RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING, REPRESENTED BY JAMIE HUMBERTO RODRIGUEZ IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REQUESTS IN COURT FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR HIMSELF AND FOR ONE OF HIS WITNESSES (PEDRO RODRIGUEZ) AND ASSISTED BY COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER: MONICA HERNANDEZ (#30154) AND PILAR ESPINOSA (#330288). CASE WAS CONSOLIDATED FOR HEARING WITH CSM-22-866238 (DANIELLE OLLIE VS RODRIGUEZ ET AL) AS CLAIM IS RELATED TO THE SAME ACCIDENT AND HAS THE SAME DEFENDANTS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OLLIE, CHARLES MICHAEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING $7,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,225.00, EXPANDED TEXT - SEE ATTACHMENT (MC-025) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY OLLIE, CHARLES MICHAEL AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-28-2022 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-28-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO FEB-23-2023 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF CHARLES MICHAEL OLLIE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ERIC GROVER; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $75. SERVED NOV-27-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) JAIME RODRIGUEZ. FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM OR HEARING OFFICER.(SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.) FILED BY OLLIE, CHARLES MICHAEL RODRIGUEZ, JAIME HUMBERTO RAMSEY EXPRESS TRUCKING
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-23-2023 - JUDGMENT.
